All 5 bugs fixed. Here's a summary:

| # | File | Bug | Fix |
|---|------|-----|-----|
| 1 | `src/parser.py:124` | Undefined `${var}` silently returns `""` | Raise `ParseError` instead |
| 2 | `src/parser.py:144` | Comma-separated values not parsed as list | Split on `,` in `_coerce` |
| 3 | `src/validator.py:66` | `bool` passes `int` type check (`bool` subclasses `int`) | Explicit `bool` check before `isinstance` |
| 4 | `src/merger.py:35` | list + scalar merge silently replaces list | Append s
